emails.subject: term sheet template
emails.body: Would I the one to handle a PPA term sheet with a potential offtake party for a Wisconsin-based peaker facility that someone in Ben's group, Ron Tapscott, is developing. Carlos Sole' Senior Counsel Enron North America Corp. 1400 Smith Street Houston, Texas 77002-7361 (713) 345-8191 (phone) 713 646-3393 (fax) Forwarded by Carlos Sole/NA/Enron on 04/20/2001 09:05 AM Ron Tapscott@ECT 04/20/2001 08:56 AM

emails.subject: Re: term sheet template
emails.body: Re: term sheet template Oh why not. You probably need to get an overview of the entire deal, as you may want some outside help. If we are building a plant and selling power, there are lots of folks at Enron who weigh in on it. Kay From: Carlos Sole on 04/20/2001 09:08 AM
